candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus reports conv>=100% but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0% (no historical analog), suppress entries — the consensus is mechanically extreme but has zero empirical track record at that configuration.
testable_rule: if consensus.conviction >= 0.95 and consensus.green_matches == 0 and consensus.hist_hr <= 0.05: veto_entry()  # require at least one historical green analog before trusting extreme conviction
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
